name: CORPAY, INC.
summary: Corpay, Inc. is a global corporate payments company providing businesses and consumers with payment and spend management solutions. Products include AP automation, cross-border payments (foreign exchange spot, forward, and option transactions), virtual cards, purchasing cards, fuel cards, toll payments, and lodging payment solutions. Corpay serves millions of businesses worldwide through direct sales, digital channels, and strategic partnerships, competing with financial institutions and specialized payment providers.

products.name: AP Automation
products.description: Automates accounts payable and vendor invoice processing for domestic and international payments.

products.name: Cross-Border Payments
products.description: Facilitates international payments via FX spot, forward, and option contracts in ~200 countries and 145 currencies.

products.name: Virtual Cards
products.description: Digital card solutions for business-to-business payments and spend control.

products.name: Purchasing and T&E Cards
products.description: Commercial cards for employee point-of-sale and travel and entertainment purchases.

products.name: Spend Management Platform
products.description: Unified platform combining virtual, purchasing, and T&E card data for real-time corporate spend visibility.

products.name: Fuel Cards
products.description: Vehicle payment cards to control and monitor fuel spending for businesses.

products.name: Toll Payments
products.description: Vehicle-related toll payment solutions and complementary services.

products.name: Lodging Payment Solutions
products.description: Manages business lodging costs including hotel and extended stay bookings with traveler support.

products.name: Multi-Currency Bank Accounts
products.description: Allows corporate and financial institution customers to hold and manage funds in multiple currencies across jurisdictions.

products.name: Proprietary Trading and Payments Platform
products.description: White-label cross-border payment platform offered to financial institutions; also available via API integration.

partnerships.description: Corpay recently acquired a partnership interest in AvidXchange.
Uses SWIFT international payments network to move liquidity globally for cross-border transactions.
